priceUpdate: SOL is -0.6% in the last 24h and +4.4% over the last 7 days, while sentiment is still extreme fear. That keeps the setup tradable, but not stable yet. 24h volume is about $3.95B, which shows active trading. The key question is whether buyers keep rotating into Solana instead of back into BTC and ETH. Near-term direction depends on whether yield headlines turn into real usage (wallets, swaps, borrowing), led by SEC approval sought for JitoSOL Solana-based liquid staking token.
thisWeek: The lead setup this week is SEC approval sought for JitoSOL Solana-based liquid staking token ETF, with traders now reacting to specific Solana headlines. Next up is A former Solana exec is taking a page out of Wall Street playbook to make global crypto. These stories only matter if they drive measurable usage, borrowing, and trading depth. Watch wallet growth, swaps, and perps depth around yield first.
nextWeek: Into next week, keep Webinar Recap on watch because it can pull incremental institutional and trading flow into the Solana complex. If that flow broadens beyond one headline, trend quality usually improves. If not, expect rotation and chop instead of continuation.
whatsHot: What's hot: yield, new products are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
